title: Multi-Modal Instruction Following
description: Create and verify image-grounded instruction-response pairs for training multi-modal models. Contributors write step-by-step instructions for tasks visible in an image, then a second contributor verifies that the instructions are followable and complete.

tasks.title: Capture task scene
tasks.description: Photograph a task setup (cooking, assembly, repair, crafting) before starting. Include visible objects and workspace.

tasks.title: Write step-by-step instructions
tasks.description: Given the image, write a clear, numbered instruction sequence (5–15 steps) that another person could follow to complete the visible task.

tasks.title: Verify instructions
tasks.description: Given the image and instructions, rate: completeness (all steps present?), clarity (unambiguous?), groundedness (references visible objects?). Flag errors.
